error_signature: require() of ES Module not supported
title: ESM vs CommonJS module compatibility issue
symptom: n8n fails to load custom nodes due to an error when requiring an ES Module, resulting in an application crash.
applies_when: Custom node depends on ESM packages
not_this_if: Custom node does not use ESM packages
No errors related to module loading
root_cause: Recent libraries like 'change-case' are now pure ES Modules, which cannot be loaded using CommonJS's require() syntax. This leads to compatibility issues when n8n attempts to load these modules.
fix_steps: Remove the 'change-case' package from your custom node's dependencies.
Install 'change-case-all' as a replacement using 'pnpm add change-case-all'.
Update the import statements in your custom node to use 'change-case-all'.
Rebuild your custom node package using 'pnpm build'.
Rebuild your Docker image and redeploy.
agent_instruction: Replace 'change-case' with 'change-case-all' in your custom node and rebuild the package.
